summary_line: Reston VA fee-only fiduciary RIA serving **both retail (individuals/families) and institutional clients** — $3.59B AUM, 46 employees, 42 advisors, 0 DRPs. Legal name 'THE BURNEY COMPANY' (folder named for the candidate-list label 'Burney Wealth Management'). Active-management firm — closer to USWM's investment philosophy than most large RIAs which lean passive/indexed. Dual-brand structure: burney.com (this site) + burneyinvest.com (institutional asset management).
regulatory_note: Folder slug uses candidate-list label; legal name in IAPD is 'THE BURNEY COMPANY' (CRD 106945). Dual-brand: burney.com is the family/wealth side; burneyinvest.com is the institutional asset management side.

notable_events.event: ADV snapshot via IAPD CRD 106945 — 46 employees, 42 advisors, $3,588,662,390 regulatory AUM, 0 DRPs. Legal name: 'THE BURNEY COMPANY.' Initial IAPD lookup with 'Burney Wealth Management' returned no hits — retried with 'Burney Company' and matched. Worth noting for future refreshes: legal name + popular brand name diverge.

Site capture: homepage only. Title: 'Burney Company | Financial Services for Families and Institutions.' Two equal-weight homepage sections: 'For individuals and families' + 'For firms and institutions.' Headline: 'Work with a nationally recognized team of fiduciaries.' CTA: 'Visit burneyinvest.com →' (separate site for the institutional side).
